ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airline */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the arrival airport */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline associated with the flight */,
  "arriving_from" TEXT /* Origin city of the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "claim_ticket_id" INTEGER /* Claim ticket number associated with the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed) */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "estimated_flight_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Assigned gate number for the flight */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number where the flight arrives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight associated with the schedule */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "baggage_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baggage claim entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight associated with the baggage claim */,
  "claim_ticket_number" INTEGER /* Claim ticket number for baggage pickup */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger claiming the baggage */,
  "baggage_type" TEXT /* Type of baggage (e.g., checked, carry-on) */,
  "baggage_tag" TEXT /* Unique tag number assigned to the baggage */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the baggage claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baggage_claims_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed) */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the status was last updated */,
  "update_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the status update */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_updates_update_by FOREIGN KEY ("update_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_updates_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight associated with the delay */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "estimated_delay_time" INTEGER /* Estimated delay time in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient's email address or phone number */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
